meta.notes: One row per unique Polymarket market across the window. `namedSource` is the host Polymarket names in its resolution criteria. `verifiedSource` is the host GenLayer verified works: equal to namedSource when the named host is accessible, a different host when we route to a verified alternative source (e.g. HLTV→Liquipedia, LaLiga→ESPN), and null when no source could be verified. `status` is the three-bucket rollup; `bucket` is the fine-grained classifier label that explains why a market is blocked (paywall, subjective, validator-IP block, etc.).
